scripts.sb:link: export $(grep -v '^#' supabase/functions/.env | grep SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN | xargs) && supabase link --project-ref tryitafcqlmzduwugqwz || true
scripts.sb:push: export $(grep -v '^#' supabase/functions/.env | grep SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN | xargs) && supabase db push || true
scripts.sb:deploy: export $(grep -v '^#' supabase/functions/.env | grep SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN | xargs) && supabase functions deploy ingest --no-verify-jwt || true
scripts.sb:secrets: export $(grep -v '^#' supabase/functions/.env | grep SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN | xargs) && supabase secrets set --env-file supabase/functions/.env || true
scripts.sb:logs: export $(grep -v '^#' supabase/functions/.env | grep SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN | xargs) && supabase functions logs ingest || true
